---
roadmap-root: docs/roadmap
done-statuses: ['Done', 'Obsolete']
active-statuses: ['Pending', 'Doing']
status-values:
  pending: 'Pending'
  specified: 'Specified'
  in-progress: 'In Progress'
  completed: 'Done'
  blocked: 'Blocked'
  obsolete: 'Obsolete'
leaf-filter: 'isIndex == false'
outcome-close-verify: []
pr-merge-strategy: 'squash'
commit-style: 'conventional'
auto-push: true
---
